tenantId.description: Tenant Id for the service principal with which the on-premise management/data plane components would communicate with our Azure services.

applicationId.description: Application/client Id for the service principal with which the on-premise management/data plane components would communicate with our Azure services.

objectId.description: Object Id of the service principal with which the on-premise management/data plane components would communicate with our Azure services.

AzureResourceProperties.description: Common properties for all azure tracked and proxy resources.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

BoolValue.description: Represents an Enum with boolean values.

isDeterministic.description: A value indicating whether the collation is deterministic.

CollationProvider.description: Represents the Collation Provider for PostgreSQL.

Edition.description: Represents the Edition of the PostgreSQL instance.

Encoding.description: Represents the supported character sets in PostgreSQL.

values.name: BIG5
values.description: Big Five character set for Traditional Chinese.

values.name: EUC_JIS_2004
values.description: Extended UNIX Code-JP supporting JIS X 0213.

values.name: GB18030
values.description: GB18030, the official character set of China.

values.name: GBK
values.description: GBK, an extension of GB2312 used in China.

values.name: JOHAB
values.description: JOHAB, a South Korean character encoding.

values.name: KOI8U
values.description: KOI8-U, an extension of KOI8-R for Ukrainian.

values.name: LATIN2
values.description: ISO 8859-2, also known as Latin-2, used for Central European languages.

values.name: LATIN7
values.description: ISO 8859-13, also known as Latin-7 (Baltic languages).

values.name: LATIN8
values.description: ISO 8859-14, also known as Latin-8 (Celtic languages).

values.name: SHIFT_JIS_2004
values.description: Shift JIS encoding with JIS X 0213 support.

values.name: UTF8
values.description: UTF-8 encoding, the most widely used Unicode format.

values.name: WIN866
values.description: Windows CP866, used for Russian language.

values.name: WIN874
values.description: Windows CP874, used for Thai language.

values.name: WIN1250
values.description: Windows CP1250, used for Central European languages.

values.name: WIN1251
values.description: Windows CP1251, used for Cyrillic script.

values.name: WIN1252
values.description: Windows CP1252, used in Western Europe (similar to Latin-1).

values.name: WIN1257
values.description: Windows CP1257, used for Baltic languages.

runAsAccountId.description: The account ID used to login.

updatedTimeStamp.description: Time when this error was last updated.

ExtendedLocation.description: The extended location for off-azure resources.

HasCustomDataTypes.description: Represents the presence of custom data types in a DB.

values.name: Unknown
values.description: Custom data types presence in the database is unknown.

values.name: True
values.description: The Database has custom data types.

values.name: False
values.description: The Database does not have custom data types.

HasTablesWithOids.description: Represents the presence of Oids in Tables under a DB.

values.name: Unknown
values.description: Oids presence in the database is unknown.

values.name: True
values.description: The Database has tables with Oids.

values.name: False
values.description: The Database does not have tables with Oids.

pgInstanceCount.description: The number of PostgreSQL instances on the machine.

Language.description: Represents the Language supported by PostgreSQL. https://wiki.postgresql.org/wiki/PL_Matrix.
